sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106654" key="u(lopoio\s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑλο-ποιὸς</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">αἰτία,</foreign> <sense id="n106654.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">material</tr_> cause, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4017.tlg001:158:26" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Syrian.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Metaph.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">158.26</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
